purpose: Deterministic local index for resolving valid machine-readable contract sources on semanticgis.dk and semanticgis.org before any runtime acquisition logic.

resolution_rule.step_1: Read this local contract index first.
resolution_rule.step_2: Use local routing and interface contracts to determine hub and contract kind.
resolution_rule.step_3: Only fetch remote contract endpoints that are explicitly declared in this index or in a previously resolved contract artifact.
resolution_rule.step_4: If no explicit remote contract endpoint is declared, do not probe website documentation pages; use local contract snapshots or template recommendations.

notes: This index intentionally prefers false-negative remote resolution over speculative probing.
If hubs later publish stable contract indexes, add those URLs here and treat them as first-class machine-readable entrypoints.
